section: MEMBER/OFFICER/EMPLOYEE FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE EXTENSION REQUEST FORM
free_text:
**COMMITTEE ON ETHICS** — U.S. House of Representatives

_Intake stamp:_ "LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER / 2019 APR 30 PM 3:09 / OFFICE OF ... / U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES" plus handwritten initials at top.

## MEMBER/OFFICER/EMPLOYEE
## FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE EXTENSION REQUEST FORM

**Name of Requestor:** Rohit Khanna _(Please type or print legibly)_   **Date:** April 3, 2019

**Employing Member/Committee/Office:** CA-17

**Financial Disclosure Statement Type (check one):**
- [X] Annual (CY 2018)
- [ ] Amendment
- [ ] New Employee
- [ ] Termination

**The length of time for which extension is requested (check one):**
- [ ] 30 days
- [ ] 60 days
- [X] 90 days
- [ ] Other _____ (any number of days or specific date)

### For Ethics Committee Use Only

**Days granted:** 90

_(If days granted differ from days requested)_

**Reason:** [ ] Total days requested exceeds 90.

Your request for an extension of time in which to file the Financial Disclosure Statement (FD) referenced above is hereby granted. Your FD must be filed on or before 8/13/19. The Ethics Committee may grant additional requests, which may not, in the aggregate, exceed 90 days from the original due date. Please note that if the date listed in this paragraph is on a weekend and you intend to file using the paper form, your FD must be received by the Clerk of the House no later than close of business on the last business day before this date or postmarked on or before that date.

**Date:** 4/29/19   _[signed]_ Theodore E. Deutch, Chairman

_[signed]_ Kenny Marchant, Ranking Member

Copy to: Legislative Resource Center, B-81 CHOB

_(This page will be publicly disclosed)_

uncertainties.read: 90 days checked; handwritten mark near 'Other' line
uncertainties.note: there is a stray handwritten mark on/near the 'Other' line, but the checked box is '90 days'; the Other box is not checked
